metadata.source_note: Fictional Atlas demo data. No real companies, people, or government documents are represented.

records.title: Runway floor
records.text: Maintain at least nine months of runway unless the board approves a signed term-sheet exception.

records.title: Vendor commitment notification
records.text: New vendor commitments at or above this annual value require board notification before signature.

records.title: Competitive renewal review
records.text: Contracts above this annual value need competitive review before renewal.

records.title: Renewal review window
records.text: Competitive review must begin this many days before renewal.

records.title: Security-blocked revenue priority
records.text: Revenue blocked by open trust controls must be prioritized above discretionary growth spend.

records.title: Headcount funding basis
records.text: New roles must map to signed revenue, security unblock work, or documented automation savings.

records.title: Customer data approval
records.text: Management must retain evidence for Northwind Robotics customer data access before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Material contract exception
records.text: Management must retain evidence for Northwind Robotics material contract changes before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Hiring exception memo
records.text: Management must retain evidence for Northwind Robotics headcount exceptions before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Budget variance notice
records.text: Management must retain evidence for Northwind Robotics budget variance before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Enterprise security review
records.text: Management must retain evidence for Northwind Robotics security review before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Revenue forecast update
records.text: Management must retain evidence for Northwind Robotics forecast changes before committing spend or forecast changes.
